description: Full transparency - clear tool names and descriptions

tool_definition.name: search_all_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through all available documents and web sources including Wikipedia, academic papers, news articles, and other content. Returns top-{k} most relevant results with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant documents

tool_definition.name: search_wikipedia
tool_definition.description: Searches through only Wikipedia articles. Returns top-{k} most relevant Wikipedia entries with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant Wikipedia articles

tool_definition.name: search_academic_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through academic papers, research articles, and scholarly publications. Returns top-{k} most relevant academic sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant academic sources

tool_definition.name: search_news_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through news articles, journalism, and current events coverage from major news outlets. Returns top-{k} most relevant news articles with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant news articles

tool_definition.name: search_entertainment_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through entertainment content including movies, TV shows, music, celebrities, and pop culture. Returns top-{k} most relevant entertainment sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant entertainment content

tool_definition.name: search_reference_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through reference materials including encyclopedias, dictionaries, biographies, and educational resources. Returns top-{k} most relevant reference sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant reference materials

tool_definition.name: search_government_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through government websites, official documents, policy information, and public records. Returns top-{k} most relevant government sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant government information

tool_definition.name: search_business_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through business publications, financial reports, industry analysis, and corporate information. Returns top-{k} most relevant business sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant business information

tool_definition.name: search_sports_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through sports news, statistics, player information, and athletic competitions. Returns top-{k} most relevant sports sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant sports information

tool_definition.name: search_history_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through historical documents, archives, and historical analysis. Returns top-{k} most relevant historical sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant historical information

tool_definition.name: search_other_sources
tool_definition.description: Searches through miscellaneous and uncategorized web sources that don't fall into specific categories like Wikipedia, news, academic, etc. Returns top-{k} most relevant other sources with snippets.

query.description: The search query to find relevant miscellaneous sources
